title: malcolmia graeca subsp. bicolor
intro: Malcolmia graeca subsp. bicolor, also known as the bicolor whitlowgrass, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is a type of herb that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and acting as an expectorant to relieve respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Malcolmia graeca subsp. bicolor include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
